description_long: This awning features a large, sloped black metal canopy supported by a robust fixed frame structure. The canopy extends outward from a brick wall, providing substantial coverage and shade to the area beneath. The front of the awning is bordered by a metal fence with stone pillars, adding both security and architectural interest. The support structure includes visible beams and posts, with the main load-bearing elements anchored to the ground and wall. The canopy itself is solid, with a straight edge trim and no visible decorative elements or signage. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for urban environments such as storefronts, garages, or public walkways.
description: A large, black metal awning with a sloped canopy, supported by a fixed frame and anchored to a brick wall, fronted by a metal fence with stone pillars.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black canopy and the brick wall beneath, with the support beam visible on the left.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the canopy, the supporting post, and a partial view of the metal fence and stone pillar.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the metal fence with stone pillars, the full width of the canopy, and the brick wall behind.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the brick wall, the canopy's slope, and the side of the support structure.
attribute_mounting_location: wall-mounted above a ground-level exterior area, anchored to brick wall and ground
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with posts and beams
